title: What Is a Terminal?
audience: Beginner AI tool users who want to start coding
learningGoal: Make the terminal feel understandable and useful instead of intimidating

scenes.title: The Terminal Looks Scary
scenes.narration: If you are new to coding, the terminal can look like a secret door with no handle.
scenes.visualPrompt: A beginner developer looking at a blank command line, with simple labels that explain what is happening.

scenes.title: It Is Just a Text Door
scenes.narration: A terminal is a text-based way to talk to your computer. You type a command, and the computer answers.
scenes.visualPrompt: A clean diagram showing user input, a command, the operating system, and a response.
